The '''Senate Guard Headquarters''', also known as the '''Senate Guard Chambers''', was the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] building that served as the headquarters for the [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]].<ref name="Republic48" /> It included an analysis lab,<ref name="Republic47">[[Republic 47|''Republic'' 47]]</ref> a prison,<ref name="Republic48" /> a medical center,<ref name="Republic46" /> and an interrogation center.<ref name="Republic48" />

{{Loc-stub}}
